arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Bid for Ndour Could Unlock Skriniar’s Move to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Fiorentina have emerged as a key player in a complex transfer scenario involving Paris Saint-Germain (PSG), Juventus, and Fenerbahce. Calciomercato report that the Viola have submitted a formal offer to PSG for the permanent transfer of Cher Ndour, a move that could have far-reaching implications for several high-profile transfers. The post Fiorentina’s Bid for Ndour Could Unlock Skriniar’s Move to Fenerbahce appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: 'I know what I can do' - Inside former Crystal Palace star Wilfried Zaha's decision to join Charlotte FC and MLS
arts.sum: That process was never easy, which Charlotte can certainly tell you, and, for a player like Zaha, that decision was never straightforward. After spending over a decade at the club where he started as an academy prospect at Crystal Palace, his moves to Turkey with Galatasaray and France on loan with Lyon hadn't gone to plan.

arts.ttl: Wilfried Zaha's Galatasaray exit confirmed as he joins MLS side
arts.sum: Wilfried Zaha has departed Galatasaray on loan to join MLS side Charlotte FC on an initial deal until January 2026. The 32-year-old spent the first half of the season on-loan at...

arts.ttl: Former Crystal Palace star Wilfried Zaha joins MLS side Charlotte on loan
arts.sum: The 32-year-old has been on loan at Lyon in Ligue 1 but has made only one start as well as five substitute appearances.

arts.ttl: Wilfried Zaha completes shock loan move as former Crystal Palace hero links up with ex-Premier League boss
arts.sum: Wilfried Zaha has completed a loan move from Turkish giants Galatasaray to join a team on loan until January 2026, with the option to extend his deal for a further six months.

arts.ttl: Charlotte signs Wilfried Zaha as DP on loan from Galatasaray
arts.sum: Former Premier League star Wilfried Zaha on Wednesday joined Charlotte FC as a Designated Player on loan from Turkish giants Galatasaray through January 2026, the MLS club announced. Zaha, 32, joined Lyon in Ligue 1 on loan from Galatasaray, but struggled to make an impact in France .

arts.ttl: Official | Wilfried Zaha leaves Lyon to sign for Charlotte FC
arts.sum: Ivory Coast international winger Wilfried Zaha (32) has left Ligue 1 side Lyon to sign for MLS franchise Charlotte FC on loan from Galatasaray, all three clubs have announced. Zaha…

arts.ttl: Zaha joins Charlotte FC on year-long loan
arts.sum: Wilfried Zaha joins Major League Soccer side Charlotte FC on loan until January 2026, with an option to extend until June 2026.

arts.ttl: PSG agree to send Skriniar to Fenerbahce: Why it impacts Juventus and Milan
arts.sum: Turkish Super Lig side Fenerbahce have confirmed that former Inter defender Milan Skriniar is on...

arts.ttl: PSG set to send Milan Škriniar on loan to Fenerbahçe
arts.sum: As reported first by Yağız Sabuncuoğlu and confirmed by Fabrice Hawkins, Fenerbahçe have reached an agreement in principle with Paris Saint-Germain for Milan Škriniar (29). Hawkins adds that the Slovakian…
